endpoints.description: ASOS search results plus facets. Use country=GB, store=COM, currency=GBP, lang=en-GB for GBP tasks. sort=freshness means newest arrivals. For midi dresses: base_colour=1,9 means Pink/Red; attribute_10155=6403 means Petite; attribute_10313=50365 means Occasion/formal. Use base_colour=1,9, not refine=base_colour:1,9. If GBP prices are all above the user's cap, answer that ASOS returned fewer than 3 exact matches; do not redo the same filters in UI.
strategy_notes: Treat this as the filtered product list source; if productIds are needed for size availability, call the summaries endpoint once for top candidates.
Do not reapply the same filters in UI after the API has returned a valid filtered result.

endpoints.description: Returns product summaries for productIds. Add expand=variants to get available sizes; use variant displaySizeText or brandSize where isAvailable is true.
strategy_notes: Use one summaries call for the productIds already selected from search; do not fan out one product at a time.
